message:
test(perf): add end-to-end TUI performance test suites (PERF-TEST-E2E / bd-2oz69)

Introduce two dedicated E2E performance test files and extend tui_state
with PERF-7 integration coverage:

tests/e2e_tui_perf.rs (676 lines):
- Long conversation responsiveness: 500 messages, scroll navigation,
  frame budget verification under realistic load
- Streaming with history: 200-message backlog + streaming isolation to
  verify prefix cache prevents full re-render during streaming
- Degradation under load: synthetic slow frames, fidelity level
  transitions, recovery to normal after pressure relief
- Memory pressure response: progressive collapse + truncation with
  structured JSONL telemetry output for CI artifact retention

tests/perf_e2e.rs (571 lines):
- Parallel test suite covering the same four scenarios with different
  harness configuration (PI_TEST_MODE=1 variant)
- Frame time measurement and prefix cache isolation assertions
- Fidelity level transition verification
- Progressive collapse + truncation under synthetic memory pressure

tests/tui_state.rs (+635 lines):
- Additional PERF-7 integration tests for render buffer capacity hint
  growth, prefix cache append behavior, and zero-copy cache hit paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
